name: Essential Privacy Pack
description: Perfect for routers or micro-servers (Raspberry Pi). Focused on network security and password management with minimal resource usage.

name: Ultimate Home Automation
description: The definitive combo for a smart home. Integrates local device control and camera security.

name: Media & Memories Pro
description: Heavy-duty suite for movie and photography lovers. Requires good CPU for media management and facial recognition.

name: DevOps Enterprise
description: Professional development environment. High demand for RAM and CPU as it includes GitLab and Jenkins.

name: The AI Automation Hub
description: Cutting-edge tech bundle. Combines local AI with workflow automation. High resource requirements.

name: SME Productivity Suite
description: Ideal for small businesses moving away from Google/Microsoft. Manage files documents and web presence.

name: Full-Stack Database Lab
description: A playground for backend developers to test different database paradigms and caching.

name: Infrastructure & Monitoring
description: Perfect for sysadmins needing to manage traffic and monitor server health.

name: Modern PaaS Cloud
description: Turn a blank server into a private cloud with a management panel and automatic proxy.

name: Personal Cloud Hub
description: Full replacement for Google Drive with basic security services. Very balanced for family use.

name: Streaming & Transcoding
description: Exclusively focused on serving high-quality multimedia content with optimized traffic management.

name: API & Web Backend
description: The ideal stack for developers who need to deploy a robust and scalable API quickly.

name: Secure Remote Office
description: Designed for secure remote work. Private VPN file storage and task automation.

name: Paperless Home Office
description: Focuses on eliminating physical paper. Smart scanning cloud storage and relational database.

name: Webmaster Tools & SEO
description: Everything needed to launch and maintain professional websites with uptime monitoring and metrics.

name: Junior Backend Starter
description: A lightweight environment to learn database management and containers without overloading the machine.

name: AI-Assisted Content Lab
description: Ideal for creators using AI to process documents and automate blog publishing.

name: Advanced Network Security
description: Total network protection with double DNS filtering VPN tunneling and container management.

name: The Ultimate All-Rounder
description: A mix of the most popular apps for those with a powerful server who want to try a bit of everything.

name: Micro PaaS Setup
description: Everything you need to host apps like Heroku. Designed for 2 CPU and 2GB RAM.

name: Data Management Lite
description: Perfect for managing documents and databases on small 2GB servers.

name: Smart Wiki & Docs
description: Collaborative documentation and wikis for a small team (2GB RAM).

name: Marketing & Tracking
description: Run your own marketing campaigns and track network securely (2 CPU / 2GB RAM).

name: Ultimate Local AI
description: Run AI agents. Requires more CPU but includes OpenClaw for local automation.
